description.from: Deals 46*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 26.2% of ATK M.DMG 7times to nearby enemies within a circular area, then deals 384*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 263.1% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec.
description.to: Deals 52(1+0.3*Skill Level) + 26.2% of ATK M.DMG per hit, attacking 7 times, to nearby enemies in a circular area around the user. Then deals 548*(1+0.3*Skill Level) + 263.1% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and knocks them down for 1.8 sec.

description.from: Deals 255*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 145% of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing ATK SPD by 35%. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec, dealing 44*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 27.8% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies.
description.to: Deals 255(1+0.3*Skill Level) + 145% of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and stuns them for 1.2 sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10 sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by 300. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.4 sec, dealing 280*(1+0.3*Skill Level) + 159% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies and stunning them for 0.6 sec.

description.from:
Summons an Arcane Crystal, dealing 518*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 221.3% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, then causes an explosion that deals 828*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 354% of ATK additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5sec, and when Kirze attacks enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies stacks of [Arcane Crystal Energy].

[Arcane Crystal Curse]: Reduces ATK SPD by 10%, and after 5sec, deals 290*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 200% of ATK M.DMG + 43% of ATK M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], then resets all stacks.
description.to:
Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal 518(1 + 0.3*Skill Level) + 221.3% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals 828*(1 + 0.3*Skill Level) + 354% of ATKadditional M.DMG. Inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] on enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by 200.
When attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing 290*(1 + 0.3*Skill Level) + 200% of ATK M.DMG plus an additional 43% of ATK per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy].

description.from: Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by 250, and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 15%.
description.to: Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by 200, and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 30%.

dark.from: Each use increases DMG by 15%. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
dark.to: If there is only 1 enemy, DMG is increased by 100%.

light.from: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 but increases duration by 4 sec.
light.to: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 and reduces Cooldown by 6 sec.

dark.from: Increases ATK SPD by an additional 35%.
dark.to: While under [Arcane Crystal Awakening], damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 20%.

light.from: [Arcane Crystal Curse] additionally reduces ATK SPD by 10%.
light.to: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 and reduces Cooldown by 6 sec.

light.from: At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 65% for 10 sec.
light.to: At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 25% for 20 sec.

description.from: [Slash, Blade of Judgment! ] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1000.
description.to: [Slash, Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.

description.from: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK SPD of all allies by 10% and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by {0}.
description.to: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 250 for the duration of Skill.

description.from: [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Increases DMG by {0}%, and gains 1 additional stack when [Arcane Crystal Energy] is stacked.
description.to: Increases DMG of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] by 40%, and upon gaining a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], there is a {0}% chance to gain 3 additional stacks.

description.from: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit DMG by 32%, and changes the CC duration increase effect to {0}%.
description.to: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by an additional 250 and the duration of CC increase effect by an additional {0}%.

dark.from: Increases Crit DMG by 30% and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
dark.to: Increases Crit DMG by 40% and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
